# Shoals Crawl Space Repair

> Expert crawl space repair, encapsulation, waterproofing, and moisture control serving Florence, AL and The Shoals area. 15+ years protecting homes from Alabama humidity.

## Services

- Crawl Space Encapsulation — Complete crawl space encapsulation to eliminate moisture
- Vapor Barrier Installation — Heavy-duty vapor barrier installation
- Crawl Space Waterproofing — Interior drainage and waterproofing systems
- Crawl Space Repair — Structural repair for damaged crawl spaces
- Moisture Control — Dehumidifiers and ventilation solutions
- Sump Pump Installation — Sump pump systems for crawl space water removal
- Crawl Space Insulation — Spray foam and rigid board insulation
- Drainage Systems — French drains and exterior drainage solutions

## Service Areas

We serve Florence, Muscle Shoals, Sheffield, Tuscumbia, Killen, Rogersville, Russellville, Decatur, Athens, Huntsville and surrounding communities in northwest Alabama.

## Contact

- Phone: (256) 415-7610
- Email: info@shoalscrawlspacerepair.com
- Website: https://shoalscrawlspacerepair.com
- Hours: Mon-Fri 8AM-6PM, Sat 9AM-2PM

## About

Shoals Crawl Space Repair is a locally owned and operated business serving the Shoals area from Florence, Alabama. We are licensed, insured, and committed to quality workmanship with written warranties on every project.
